task_text: Bearbeite die alteste Nachricht im Posteingang.

next_step.current_state: Need perform mandatory identity bootstrap before task-specific actions: tree /, read AGENTS.md, context.
next_step.observation: No workspace inspection has been performed yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed. Now executing mandated bootstrap read of AGENTS.md.
next_step.observation: Workspace tree shows multiple AGENTS.MD files including one at root.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS. Must complete bootstrap with context before task-specific work. Then follow AGENTS rule: inspect 99_system tree and relevant workflow.
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD requires reading nested AGENTS when entering folders and inspecting 99_system before task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (root tree, AGENTS, context). Now complying with rulebook to inspect 99_system before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant workflow for processing inbox

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree. Need nested rulebook before reading workflow.
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflows including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: Need specific workflow guidance. Entering workflows folder requires reading nested AGENTS.MD first.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect inbox and process oldest message
next_step.observation: 99_system policy note says workflows define how to act in workspace.

next_step.current_state: Workflow folder guidance indicates inbox processing docs are relevant. Need read process-next-inbox-item before acting.
next_step.observation: Workflows AGENTS says to read process docs for inbox tasks, including processing-inbox-email when applicable.

next_step.current_state: Completed required system workflow read. Now moving to inbox lane; must read nested AGENTS before processing inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute requested task per its contents
next_step.observation: Process-next-inbox-item workflow specifies selecting the lowest filename in 00_inbox and reading it before action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox rules loaded. Next, read the oldest actionable inbox file (lowest filename excluding AGENTS).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Follow its request with required verifications
Delete inbox file if fully completed
next_step.observation: 00_inbox rules confirm processing starts from lowest visible inbox filename and deletion occurs only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request parsed; to review the referenced bill I need to access finance lane with nested rulebooks first.
next_step.observation: Inbox item requests finding and reviewing a specific bill, then paying via bank transfer and confirming completion.

next_step.current_state: Entered finance lane; now need purchases subfolder rulebook before opening bill.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine what parts of request are supported
next_step.observation: Finance AGENTS marks records as sensitive and warns not to infer authorization for financial actions from casual chat.

next_step.current_state: Ready to inspect the referenced purchase record for the requested review.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess capability for bank transfer confirmation
next_step.observation: Purchases lane rules emphasize trust boundaries and reviewable financial handling.

next_step.current_state: I verified identity/rules, processed the oldest inbox file, and reviewed the referenced bill. Request requires executing and confirming a real bank transfer, which is an external action unavailable in this sandbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report unsupported capability outcome with evidence
next_step.observation: The reviewed bill file confirms Filamenthütte Wien, date 2025-12-04, and total EUR 72; the inbox request also asks to pay by bank transfer and confirm completion.

function.message: Ich habe die älteste Inbox-Nachricht geprüft und die angefragte Rechnung gefunden sowie inhaltlich geprüft: Filamenthütte Wien, 2025-12-04, EUR 72. Die Ausführung einer Banküberweisung und die Bestätigung einer erfolgten Zahlung kann ich in dieser Sandbox jedoch nicht durchführen.
function.rulebook_notes: Befolgt: Identity-Bootstrap (tree/read/context), relevante verschachtelte AGENTS gelesen, Inbox-Workflow angewendet, keine Mutation bei blockiertem/unsupported Ausgang.
function.outcome_justification: Die Aufgabe verlangt eine externe Finanzaktion ('Pay by bank transfer and confirm when done'). Die verfügbaren Tools erlauben nur Dateisystem-Operationen im Workspace, keine Bank-/Zahlungs-API oder reale Transaktionsbestätigung. Daher ist die Anforderung technisch nicht unterstützbar.
